enText: Li Qiang said that President Xi Jinping held talks with President Trump to provide strategic guidance for the development of relations between the two countries. China is willing to work with the United States to implement the important consensus of the two heads of state. Mutual achievements and promote prosperity. A stable and predictable Sino-US economic and trade relationship is in line with the interests of the two countries and the world. A stable development of the Chinese economy will provide more opportunities for enterprises in various countries. A stable and open policy environment is the long-term commitment of the Chinese government. It hopes that more U.S. enterprises will continue to continue to cultivate the Chinese market and continue to be a bridge of communication and dialogue between the two countries to promote mutual trust and friendship between China and the United States.

zhText: 李强表示习近平主席同特朗普总统举行会谈为两国关系发展做出战略指引中方愿同美方一道落实好两国元首重要共识相互成就共促繁荣一个稳定可预期的中美经贸关系符合两国和世界利益一个稳定发展的中国经济将为各国企业提供更多机遇 一个稳定开放的政策环境是中国政府长期不变的承诺希望更多美资企业持续深耕中国市场继续做两国沟通对话的桥梁促进中美互信友好

enText: Representatives of the U.S. business community said that the successful meeting of the two heads of state injected new impetus into economic and trade cooperation between the United States and China. The U.S. business community is willing to expand cooperation with China and make greater efforts to enhance mutual understanding and cooperation between the two countries. Wu Zhenglong attended the meeting.

enText: The growth rate of M2 balance and social financing scale has remained at a reasonable level. The support for the real economy is stable. At the end of April, the balance of various RMB loans increased by 281 trillion yuan year-on-year. 5.6%. The loan scale maintained a reasonable growth. The current loan structure continued to be optimized. In April, the average interest rate on new loans issued by enterprises and newly issued loans for personal housing was about 3.1%. The loan interest rate remained at a low level.

enText: The China Logistics and Procurement Federation announced today that in April, China's e-commerce logistics index rebounded by 110.6 points month-on-month. The e-commerce logistics index generally showed a stable and uprising trend. The operation of express enterprises has maintained a stable logistics time limit performance rate. The total business volume of e-commerce logistics and the rural business volume increased by about 20% and 25% year-on-year, respectively.

enText: The latest data shows that China's export value of construction machinery products in the first quarter of this year increased by 24.3% year-on-year. Judging from the export products, the export value of aluminum belt excavators, non-highway mining dump trucks, electric forklifts and lifting platform loaders, concrete mixers and other products grew rapidly. The person in charge of the China Construction Machinery Industry Association said that since the 14th Five-Year Plan, China's export value of construction machinery has continuously exceeded 300 billion to 50 billion US dollars and continued to grow rapidly in the first quarter of this year. In addition to the relative stability of international market demand, due to the continuous improvement of the technical level of China's engineering machinery products and product performance, engineering machinery products have been sold to more than 230 countries and regions around the world. The market coverage is more balanced and the export resilience of engineering machinery products has been continuously enhanced.

zhText: 最新数据显示今年一季度我国工程机械产品出口额 160.66亿美元同比增长 24.3%从出口产品来看铝带挖掘机非公路矿用自卸车电动叉车及升降平台装载机混凝土搅拌车等产品出口额增长较快中国工程机械工业协会负责人表示十四五以来我国工程机械出口额连续跨越 300亿 400亿 500亿 600亿美元台阶今年一季度继续保持快速增长除了国际市场需求相对稳定外得益于我国工程机械产品技术水平产品性能不断提升工程机械产品已销售到全球 230多个国家和地区市场覆盖更加均衡工程机械产品出口韧性持续增强。

The futures market continued to provide support for the industrial chain supply chain supply chain to actively serve the high-quality development of the real economy. Norovirus is a common pathogen that causes acute gastroenteritis. After infection, vomiting, diarrhea and other symptoms usually occur. The virus is highly contagious.
